links.grantor: Dexter S. Odin, David E. Feldman, and George P. Swenson, Trustees

evidence_refs.text_snippet:
AND BEING the same property conveyed a 75% interest unto PWC-Parcel A, LLC, a Virginia
limited liability company by virtue of a Deed from Dexter S. Odin, David E. Feldman, and George P.
Swenson, Trustees, dated December 31, 2005 and recorded January 30, 2006 in Instrument No.
200601300015999, among the land records of Prince William County, Virginia.

AND BEING the same property conveyed a 25% interest unto MJV Parcel A, LLC, a Virginia limited
liability company by virtue of a Deed from MJV Associates, LLC. a Virginia limited liability
company dated January 1, 2016 and recorded June 17, 2016 in Instrument No. 201606170045675.
among the land records of Prince William County, Virginia.
